message:
fix: cleanup timer in finally block, fix double interrupted emission

- Move clearTimeout(timeoutTimer) and this.signal restore to finally block
  so cleanup runs on both happy path and exception path
- Remove duplicate 'interrupted' event emission from planningResult handler
  since requestPlanResponse already emits it before returning 'interrupted'
- Keep the 'interrupted' emission in the top-of-loop signal check where no
  LLM call has occurred yet
